name: behavioral-evals
tagline: Decision tree and checklist for creating, running, fixing, and promoting behavioral evals of agent decision-making.
verdict: Well-structured decision tree with good context-splitting into reference files, but its declared 'Single Source of Truth' is a personal absolute file:// path (/Users/abhipatel/...) that cannot resolve for any other user, leaving the actual run/verify step unexecutable as written. No exclusions and no version signal either.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body.
Step 3 'Verify' defers actual run commands entirely to 'evals/README.md' via a broken personal file:// link, leaving the step unexecutable as written.
Policy values (USUALLY_PASSES/ALWAYS_PASSES) are named but the eval test artifact's file location/naming/structure is never defined.
